description: Replay consumption vectors. Verifies consumed nonces block reuse, resurrection attempts are rejected, and unused nonces remain eligible.

invariants.consumed_state_permanent: CONSUMED state is irreversible; no restoration path exists
invariants.resurrection_forbidden: any attempt to restore a CONSUMED nonce returns NULL

vectors.description: consumed nonce: replay_state CONSUMED; restoration_eligible false — any reuse returns NULL
replay resurrection attempt: resurrection_claim true on CONSUMED nonce — NULL enforced
unused nonce: replay_state UNUSED — eligible for first-and-only use
